rationale.R1.2: The critique identifies several logical inconsistencies in the argumentation, particularly regarding the claim of distribution-free calibration and the strength of empirical evidence.
rationale.RX.1: The analysis flags uncertainty for some claims, such as the absolute guarantee of distribution-free calibration, but doesn't fully explore uncertainty across all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The critique mostly stays within the scope of analyzing the framing and argumentation of the section, with minor deviations into suggesting rewrites.
rationale.RX.4: The analysis correctly identifies no regressions or harmful content introduced by the proposed method.
rationale.RX.5: The analysis lacks specific details on how the proposed method traces its changes and provides provenance for each non-cosmetic modification.
